_comment: Phase 1 SPSA config: LMR weighted terms. Requires Phase 1 UCI options to be wired up first.
_prereq: Each 'name' must match a UCI 'option name ... type spin' in src/search_options.rs

params.name: LmrTtPv
params._note: LMR reduction for PV/TT-PV nodes (in 1024ths, negative = reduce less)

params.name: LmrExactBound
params._note: LMR reduction when TT bound is Exact (in 1024ths)

params.name: LmrCutNode
params._note: LMR extra reduction at cut nodes (in 1024ths)

params.name: LmrShallowTt
params._note: LMR reduction when TT entry depth < depth-1 (in 1024ths)
